utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required items in format: 5 (health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget). Items appearing in the final plan: all 5 appear. Now check if each is fully specified with costs. - health_coverage: Requires 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'. Provided as two subitems: physical_health (€100/month) and mental_health (€65/month). Costs present; plan names given. This satisfies the requirement. - property_coverage: Requires 'home/contents insurance with costs'. Provided as 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage (€60/month)'. Cost present; however, it does not explicitly state both home and contents coverage details, but the format only mandates 'home/contents insurance with costs', which this meets at a basic level. - travel_coverage: Provided with cost (€50/month). Meets requirement. - additional_services: Provided 'Adventure Travel Coverage (€80/month)' with cost. Meets requirement. - total_budget: Provided as '€355/month' (a complete monthly cost). Annual not required explicitly; monthly is acceptable. Therefore, all 5 items are included with costs, satisfying the required details at the level specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final plan includes specific items: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health, LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health, LifeFirst Standard Coverage for property, LifeFirst Standard Plan for travel, and Adventure Travel Coverage as an add-on. I matched each to the ground-truth sections: primary_health_coverage.physical_health -> LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 9); primary_health_coverage.mental_health -> LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 9); property_protection.home_content -> LifeFirst Standard Coverage (rating 9); mobility_coverage.travel_insurance -> LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 9); travel_enhancement_services -> Adventure Travel Coverage (rating 10).
